query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: Dark silhouettes of multiple people with raised arms and splayed fingers fill the lower frame, viewed from behind, set against a luminous background that transitions from deep red to bright orange and yellow, suggesting a live concert or festival environment with strong backlighting.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Dark silhouettes of a crowd with raised arms and splayed fingers are set against a luminous red-to-orange background, but the entire scene is heavily pixelated into a coarse grid where all fine detail dissolves into large, blocky squares, with severe digital aliasing and quantization obliterating individual features and foregrounding the low-resolution digital medium.
